--- a/lib/stimulus_reflex/reflex_factory.rb
+++ b/lib/stimulus_reflex/reflex_factory.rb
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
 module StimulusReflex
   class ReflexFactory
+    class ReflexMethodNotFoundError < StandardError; end
     
     def self.reflex_for(channel, data)
       reflex_data = ReflexData.new(data)
@@ -15,6 +16,7 @@ module StimulusReflex
       reflex = reflex_class.new(channel, url: reflex_data.url, element: reflex_data.element, selectors: reflex_data.selectors)
       reflex.params = channel.connection.params
       reflex.method_name = reflex_data.method_name
+      validate_reflex_method!(reflex, reflex_data.method_name)
       
       reflex_data.args.each do |arg|
         reflex.arguments << arg
@@ -25,5 +27,15 @@ module StimulusReflex
     
     private
     
+    def self.validate_reflex_method!(reflex, method_name)
+      # Get all ancestors up to but not including StimulusReflex::Reflex
+      ancestors = reflex.class.ancestors[0..reflex.class.ancestors.index(StimulusReflex::Reflex) - 1]
+      
+      # Check if the method is defined in any of these ancestors
+      allowed = ancestors.any? { |ancestor| ancestor.public_instance_methods(false).include?(method_name.to_sym) }
+      
+      raise ReflexMethodNotFoundError, "Reflex method '#{method_name}' is not defined on class '#{reflex.class.name}' or on any of its ancestors" unless allowed
+    end
+    
   end
 end

--- a/src/transformers/models/marian/tokenization_marian.py
+++ b/src/transformers/models/marian/tokenization_marian.py
@@ -12,6 +12,7 @@
 # See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
 # limitations under the License.
 import re
+import time
 from typing import List, Optional
 
 from ...tokenization_utils import PreTrainedTokenizer
@@ -19,6 +20,25 @@ from ...utils import logging
 
 
 logger = logging.get_logger(__name__)
+
+
+def safe_re_search(pattern, string, timeout=0.1):
+    """
+    Safe version of re.search with timeout protection against ReDoS attacks.
+    
+    Args:
+        pattern (str): Regular expression pattern
+        string (str): String to search
+        timeout (float): Maximum time in seconds to allow for regex matching
+    
+    Returns:
+        Match object or None if no match found or timeout exceeded
+    """
+    start_time = time.time()
+    match = re.search(pattern, string)
+    if time.time() - start_time > timeout:
+        raise TimeoutError(f"Regex matching exceeded timeout of {timeout} seconds")
+    return match
 
 
 class MarianTokenizer(PreTrainedTokenizer):
@@ -267,7 +287,7 @@ class MarianTokenizer(PreTrainedTokenizer):
         include_in_weight_decay: Optional[List[str]] = None,
         exclude_from_weight_decay: Optional[List[str]] = None,
     ):
-        # This method appears to be incorrectly placed in tokenization code
+        # This method appears to be incorrectly placed in tokenization code
         # but we need to secure it against ReDoS attacks
         name = param_name
         
@@ -275,13 +295,13 @@ class MarianTokenizer(PreTrainedTokenizer):
             return False
         
         if include_in_weight_decay is not None:
-            if any(re.search(pattern, name) for pattern in include_in_weight_decay):
+            if any(safe_re_search(pattern, name) for pattern in include_in_weight_decay):
                 return True
         
         if exclude_from_weight_decay is not None:
-            if any(re.search(pattern, name) for pattern in exclude_from_weight_decay):
+            if any(safe_re_search(pattern, name) for pattern in exclude_from_weight_decay):
                 return False
         
         # Default to including in weight decay if no patterns match
         return include_in_weight_decay is None
